title: Deep Agent
description: Adds strategic planning, persistent state, and long-context management on top of LangChain.
Can be invoked as a tool (`<nodeId>.run_agent`) for hierarchical agent orchestration.

tool.description: Tools available to the agent (via control-plane invoke)

deepagent.description: DeepAgent sub-agent nodes for hierarchical orchestration

agent_description.title: Agent description
agent_description.description: What does this agent do? Describe its purpose and capabilities — this helps parent agents select and invoke it correctly.

system_prompt.title: System prompt
system_prompt.description: Instructions that define this agent's role and behaviour. Leave blank to use the default.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Additional instructions to guide the agent. Each line is appended to the system prompt.

advanced_mode.title: Advanced Mode
advanced_mode.description: When enabled, replace the Instructions list with direct Agent Description and System Prompt fields for full control.
